results.title: Sales Prospecting Tool for Real-Time ICP Search
results.content:
## FAQs About Lev8Sales Prospecting Tool

A sales prospecting tool helps teams find potential customers, identify the right contacts, collect useful context, and prepare for outreach. Lev8 focuses on helping GTM teams find high-fit people in real time, enrich prospect context, and decide who is worth contacting first.

Lev8 uses AI real-time search instead of only relying on a static contact database. You describe the people you need, and Lev8 helps find matching prospects based on current criteria, account context, intent signals, and fit. [...] Lev8 uses AI real-time search instead of only relying on a static contact database. You describe the people you need, and Lev8 helps find matching prospects based on current criteria, account context, intent signals, and fit.

Traditional databases give you existing records and filters. Lev8 runs live AI searches around your specific target, helping you find prospects who are relevant now, not just stored in a list. Can Lev8 help reduce low-quality leads? Yes. Lev8 helps teams search by ICP, buyer role, company type, market, pain point, intent signal, and prospect scenario. Lead scoring and context help your team focus on better-fit prospects instead of spending time on broad, noisy lists. [...] Yes. Lev8 can use intent data, social signals, and lead scoring to help teams identify prospects with stronger fit, clearer pain, or a more timely reason to engage. This is useful when a team has many possible leads but limited time for outreach.

Yes. Lev8 can generate personalized email copy, cold outreach copy, and opening lines based on prospect background and context. It is built for drafting outreach, not for sending, scheduling, follow-ups, or sequence management.

results.title: Free Data Enrichment Tool Online
results.content:
You might start with a list of emails or company names, then enrich each record with roles, tech stacks, LinkedIn profiles, phone numbers, and company details for personalized outreach.

The right tool depends on your daily workflow. If you want real-time contacts, richer profiles, and built-in email outreach without coding, Lev8 is designed for that use case.

Start by defining your ideal buyer. Use enrichment to fill gaps in your existing lists, segment your audience with firmographics, and launch targeted campaigns while the data is still fresh.

For active sales, recruiting, and GTM workflows, refresh key records at least monthly and use event monitoring for high-priority accounts so your outreach matches the right timing.

results.title: ZoomInfo vs Lev8: Buyer Guide | Lev8 Blog | Lev8
results.content:
FAQ

## Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, but only for some workflows. Lev8 can be evaluated as a ZoomInfo alternative when the team wants AI prospecting, live signals, enrichment, scoring, and action recommendations. If the team mainly wants a large B2B contact database, ZoomInfo is closer to that original need.

ZoomInfo is more focused on third-party data coverage, company/contact intelligence, and intent data at scale. Lev8 is more focused on signal-based prospecting, waterfall enrichment, verified profiles, and next-step GTM actions. [...] The weak spot appears after discovery.

Third-party data usually answers, "Who might fit?" Signal-based GTM asks a sharper question: "Who has a reason to care now?"

Those are different jobs.

An account researching a topic may not be in-market. A VP title may look perfect while the person has already changed companies. A filled-in phone field can still be unusable. A contact can pass a filter and still fail the sales motion.

A stronger GTM workflow connects five checks before outreach:

1. Does the account match the ICP?
2. Is the person still in the right role?
3. Is the signal fresh enough?
4. Does the signal explain why now?
5. Should the next step be research, enrichment, routing, or outreach? [...] ZoomInfo provides B2B company and contact intelligence built from external, public, business, and professional data sources. Buyers should review ZoomInfo's official data sources, privacy policy, and trust materials before pushing records into CRM or outbound workflows.

Usually, no. Third-party data helps teams find people and accounts that may fit. Outbound still needs current title checks, verified contact data, relevant triggers, message fit, and timing. Without those checks, the team may simply sequence bad records faster.
